title: athyrium decurrenti-alatum
intro: Athyrium decurrenti-alatum, also known as the Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Athyrium decurrenti-alatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
